page_metadata.biotools__summary: A workflow combining a series of time- and memory-efficient motif analysis tools to extract motifs from full-size collections of peaks as generated by ChIP-seq, ChIP-chip or other ChIP-X technologies.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A workflow combining a series of time- and memory-efficient motif analysis tools to extract motifs from full-size collections of peaks as generated by ChIP-seq, ChIP-chip or other ChIP-X technologies.
